motivation.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
motivation.author: Steve Jobs

motivation.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
motivation.author: Sam Levenson

motivation.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
motivation.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

motivation.text: It is during our darkest moments that we must focus to see the light.
motivation.author: Aristotle

motivation.text: The only impossible journey is the one you never begin.
motivation.author: Tony Robbins

motivation.text: Your limitation—it's only your imagination. Push it harder.
motivation.author: Unknown

inspiration.text: Everything you want is on the other side of fear.
inspiration.author: George Addair

inspiration.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
inspiration.author: Theodore Roosevelt

inspiration.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow is our doubts of today.
inspiration.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

inspiration.text: Great things never come from comfort zones.
inspiration.author: Unknown

inspiration.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
inspiration.author: Winston Churchill

inspiration.text: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
inspiration.author: Unknown

success.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
success.author: Winston Churchill

success.text: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
success.author: Thomas Jefferson

success.text: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
success.author: Walt Disney

success.text: Don't be afraid to give up the good to go for the great.
success.author: John D. Rockefeller

success.text: I have learned over the years that when one's mind is made up, this diminishes fear.
success.author: Rosa Parks

success.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
success.author: Henry David Thoreau

love.text: The best and most beautiful things in this world cannot be seen or even heard, but must be felt with the heart.
love.author: Helen Keller

love.text: Love is not about how much you say 'I love you', but how much you can prove it's true.
love.author: Unknown

love.text: Love all, trust a few, do wrong to none.
love.author: William Shakespeare

love.text: The heart wants what it wants. Or else it does not care.
love.author: Emily Dickinson

love.text: Love is the greatest refreshment in life.
love.author: Pablo Picasso

love.text: To love oneself is the beginning of a lifelong romance.
love.author: Oscar Wilde

humor.text: Why fit in when you were born to stand out?
humor.author: Dr. Seuss

humor.text: I'm not lazy, I'm just on energy-saving mode.
humor.author: Unknown

humor.text: People say nothing is impossible, but I do nothing every day.
humor.author: Unknown

humor.text: If you can't laugh at yourself, life's going to seem a lot longer than it is.
humor.author: Taylor Swift

humor.text: A day without laughter is a day wasted.
humor.author: Charlie Chaplin

humor.text: I told my computer I needed a break, and now it won't stop sending me Kit-Kat ads.
humor.author: Unknown
